title: 8. Console settings UI
description: Add settings UI for theme, light/dark/system mode, motion mode, and typeface. Animate settings panel and selector based on motion setting.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added console appearance settings (mode/theme/motion/typeface) with localStorage persistence and animated selector honoring motion mode. Added BDD specs and steps for settings.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Aligned theme palettes with Biblicus: neutral/cool/warm mapped to Radix gray/blue/sand with light/dark variants via radix dark tokens.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Settings UI matches Biblicus behavior; appearance stored in localStorage; motion off disables selector/panel animations; BDD specs cover defaults and persistence.
